commands.command: uv run --package truealpha-data-engine python -m pytest apps/data-engine/tests/datahub -q
uv run --package truealpha-contracts python -m ruff check libs/contracts/src/truealpha_contracts/capture_control.py libs/contracts/tests/test_capture_control.py
uv run --package truealpha-data-engine python -m ruff check apps/data-engine/src/data_engine/datahub apps/data-engine/tests/datahub apps/data-engine/scripts/run_capture_control.py

negative_controls: mutable latest/current list, source, schedule, parser, mapping, confidence, or recapture policy coordinate
campaign, run, obligation, work-item, attempt, raw-object, observation, plan, or checkpoint identity drift
identical raw bytes erase a later attempt, observation event, or separate list obligation
duplicate obligation, non-contiguous attempt, retry after terminal outcome, or unbounded retry
missing terminal state, denominator shrink, or aggregate-ratio substitution
resume duplicates logical work, loses an attempt, or repairs history with UPDATE or DELETE
recapture execution differs from its frozen dry-run selection, broadens a predicate, or rewrites an unaffected cell
GOOG and GOOGL collapse to one instrument or TOPT differs from 20 issuers, 21 instruments, and 84 obligations
an E2 consumer/environment permission grants Staging or Production access before D5 terminal acceptance
source call before scope, policy, rights, budget, and call-plan authorization
root export, global Dagster definition, default schedule, Staging route, Production route, or release binding
